mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN B.FAILCNT > 4 THEN 'F' WHEN B.SERIAL <> #{serial} THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END), 'T') AS TIMECHECK FROM (SELECT /*+ INDEX(A IX_SMSAUTH_UI) */ A.FAILCNT AS FAILCNT , A.SERIAL AS SERIAL , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.SEQ DESC) R_NO FROM TZ_SMSAUTH A WHERE A.USERID = #{s_userid} AND TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN A.STDT AND A.ENDT ORDER BY A.SEQ DESC ) B WHERE B.R_NO = 1
limit 100
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TZ_SMSAUTH ( USERID , HANDPHONE , SERIAL , STDT , ENDT
, OPT , LSTDT
, LG_IP ) VALUES ( #{s_userid} , (SELECT HANDPHONE FROM TZ_MEMBER WHERE USERID = #{s_userid}) , #{serial} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + 3/24/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, #{opt} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, #{lgIp} )

INSERT INTO SDK_SMS_SEND ( MSG_ID, USER_ID, SCHEDULE_TYPE, SUBJECT, NOW_DATE, SEND_DATE, CALLBACK, DEST_INFO, SMS_MSG ) VALUES ( SDK_SMS_SEQ.NEXTVAL,
#{userid},
#{s_userid},
0, '', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + 3/24/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), '15883391', #{senderTel}, #{title} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE TZ_SMSAUTH SET OPT = 'Y' , LSTDT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE USERID = #{s_userid} AND HANDPHONE = (SELECT HANDPHONE FROM TZ_MEMBER WHERE USERID = #{s_userid}) AND SERIAL = #{serial} AND OPT = 'N'
AND TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(STDT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24') AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENDT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24') AND SEQ = ( SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM TZ_SMSAUTH WHERE USERID = #{s_userid} AND HANDPHONE = (SELECT HANDPHONE FROM TZ_MEMBER WHERE USERID = #{s_userid}) AND TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(STDT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24') AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENDT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24') )
mapper.select:
SELECT GADMIN FROM TZ_MANAGER A WHERE A.GADMIN = #{p_auth} AND A.USERID = #{s_userid} AND A.ISDELETED = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.FMON AND A.TMON
limit 100
mapper.update:
UPDATE TZ_SMSAUTH SET FAILCNT = FAILCNT + 1
WHERE USERID = #{userid} AND HANDPHONE = (SELECT HANDPHONE FROM TZ_MEMBER WHERE USERID=#{userid})
WHERE USERID = #{s_userid} AND HANDPHONE = (SELECT HANDPHONE FROM TZ_MEMBER WHERE USERID=#{s_userid})
AND OPT = 'N'
AND TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(STDT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24') AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENDT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24') AND SEQ = ( SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM TZ_SMSAUTH
WHERE USERID = #{userid} AND HANDPHONE = (SELECT HANDPHONE FROM TZ_MEMBER WHERE USERID=#{userid})
WHERE USERID = #{s_userid} AND HANDPHONE = (SELECT HANDPHONE FROM TZ_MEMBER WHERE USERID=#{s_userid})
AND TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(STDT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24') AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENDT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24') )
mapper.select:
SELECT CASE WHEN ( SELECT NVL(MAX('Y'),'N') AS CHECKYN FROM TB_CONT_ADMR WHERE OP_ADMR_ID = #{s_userid} AND OP_ROLE_CD != 'CF' ) = 'Y' OR ( SELECT NVL(MAX('Y'),'N') AS CHECKYN FROM TZ_TUTOR WHERE USERID = #{s_userid} AND ISTUTOR = 'y' AND ISSTATUS = 'y' ) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHECKYN FROM DUAL
limit 100
